zh.lifeSummary: 當Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering於1266年出生在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登時，她的父親Robert FitzRoger Clavering32歲，母親Baroness Margery La Zouche15歲。她於大約1282年與Ralph Neville在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1329年在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克享年63歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆斯泰德洛普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering于1266年出生在英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登时，她的父亲Robert FitzRoger Clavering32岁，母亲Baroness Margery La Zouche15岁。她于大约1282年与Ralph Neville在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1329年在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克享年63岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆斯泰德洛普。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clavering
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name; the Essex name is from Clavering (Essex), but in NE England it is probably from Clavering near Wooler (Northumb).

nameMeanings.name: Euphemia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a Late Greek name derived from eu ‘well, good’ + phēnai ‘to speak’. This was the name of various early saints, notably a virgin martyr said to have been burned at the stake at Chalcedon in 307 . It had a limited popularity in some regions in the 16th and 17th centuries and returned to favour in the Victorian period, especially in the pet form Effie . It is little used at present.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering was born in 1266, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, her father, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, was 32 and her mother, Baroness Margery La Zouche, was 15. She married Ralph Neville about 1282, in Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1329, in Warwick, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Staindrop, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering est née en 1266, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Baroness Margery La Zouche, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Neville environ 1282, à Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1329, à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Staindrop, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering 1266 in Saffron Walden, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert FitzRoger Clavering 32 und ihre Mutter Baroness Margery La Zouche 15. Sie hat um 1282 in Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Ralph Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1329 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Warwick, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Staindrop, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering è nata il nel 1266 nel Saffron Walden, Essex, England, sua padre, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Baroness Margery La Zouche, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Neville circa 1282, nel Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1329, nel Warwick, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Staindrop, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Euphemia Fitzroger de Claveringが1266年にイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンで生まれた時，父Robert FitzRoger Claveringは32歳，母Baroness Margery La Zoucheは15歳であった。約1282年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワークウオルスでRalph Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1329年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックで63歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムスティインドロップにて埋葬された。

ko.Staindrop, , Durham, England - Raby With: 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비 위스 케버스톤
ko.lifeSummary: Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering(이)가 1266년 영국 에세스 사프런 월든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert FitzRoger Clavering(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness Margery La Zouche(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1282년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 워k워스에서 Ralph Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1329년 영국 워윅실르 워윅에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 스테인드럽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering nasceu em 1266, em Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Margery La Zouche, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Neville aproximadamente 1282, em Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1329, em Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra.

ro.Staindrop, , Durham, England - Raby With: Raby with Keverstone, Durham, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Staindrop, , Durham, England - Raby With: раби вит кивирстоун, дурам, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering родилась в 1266 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert FitzRoger Clavering было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Baroness Margery La Zouche, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Neville около 1282 г. в местности варкворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1329 г. в местности варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности стеиндроп, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering nació en 1266, en Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Baroness Margery La Zouche, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Ralph Neville aproximadamente 1282, en Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1329, en Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra.
